serviceNotes.engine oil: M57 3.0L six-cylinder diesel; fixed-interval EU oil ~15,000 km.
serviceNotes.EGR / intake clean: Six-cylinder diesel EGR/intake soot. Cleaning when faults or poor response appear (~120,000 km planning).

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW owner's manual E46 diesel (M57) — Oil Service; 15,000 km common EU fixed schedule. Tier 2 diesel proxy: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service lists 10,000 km / 12 months for 320d — verify 330d booklet / market
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW owner's manual E46 — cabin microfilter on Inspection II cadence (~30,000 km typical EU spacing)
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake fluid every 24 months (DOT 4 LV)
serviceSources.air cleaner element: BMW owner's manual E46 — diesel air filter ~30,000 km typical major-inspection spacing. Tier 2 M47 proxy page lists shorter air-filter km — confirm M57 printed table
serviceSources.fuel filter: BMW owner's manual E46 diesel — file 60,000 km per common EU six-cylinder diesel spacing. Tier 2 M47 proxy (https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service) lists 20,000 km fuel filter — verify M57-specific OEM schedule
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake inspection ~15,000 km service cadence
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake inspection ~15,000 km service cadence
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW owner's manual E46 — Inspection I/II vehicle check (~60,000 km typical EU spacing)
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: ZF/BMW specialist consensus; ATF often lifetime-fill — preventive independent interval
serviceSources.manual gearbox fluid: BMW owner's manual — no routine manual trans fluid interval; preventive specialist interval
serviceSources.xDrive transfer case fluid: BMW specialist consensus (xd AWD); OEM often lifetime-fill — preventive interval for 330xd
serviceSources.differential fluids: BMW specialist consensus (xd AWD); OEM often lifetime-fill — preventive interval for 330xd
serviceSources.coolant flush: BMW owner's manual E46 coolant interval by model; file value preventive — confirm booklet
serviceSources.EGR / intake clean: Diesel specialist consensus (EGR/intake soot); not a single fixed BMW MFR km in consumer schedule
